creator: matt.r.smith@bt.com
text: FYI. Regarding the issue where compiling with ASM enabled on some hardware causes massive issues with software like postfix, vim, PHP etc when it corrupts the environment. Since the release of 1.0.2c I decided to attempt it with ASM enabled again to see what happens. This time it worked fine. No issues at all seen. So it could either be something that's changed between 1.0.2a and 1.0.2c or something has changed in 10.1-STABLE which has worked around this as I've also upgraded that several times since. Either way, it's working fine now.
